name: com.unitycgchat.2channelcolorencoding
description: Converts color textures into 2-channel encoded textures using the GPU Pro 5 method. Reduces texture memory by encoding RGB through a fitted color plane into RG channels with luminance and hue factor.

samples.description: Ready-to-use URP shaders (Unlit and Lit) with a Custom Inspector button to auto-create materials from encoding assets.
